title: Episode Page
description:
The most important page of the site, visited by 2M people a day.
The unique challenge of this page was integrating video ads into an audio product. I believe we were able to achieve a satisfying user experience while still captializing on much higher video CPMs.

title: Directory pages
description: Pages for top level categories were developed with techniques found on topic specific content verticals. A heavy focus on SEO and a design catering to landing visitors boosted listening engagement here.
